original_image_tags: Three black circular hole-punch marks are visible along the bottom edge of the page.

elements.description: A typed table listing launch sequences 96 through 114 from September to December 1961, with columns for Launch Seq, Date, Nickname, Op #, Facility, Vehicle Type, Program, Cum by Booster, Command, and Cum by Command. Includes a footnote stating 'Data not available' and the page number 'PAGE 6' at the bottom right.

judge.reason: Description A describes visual elements (three hole-punch marks) while Description B describes a typed table, indicating they are describing completely different visual content on the page.
